title: [Device Support Request] Tuya TS0003 – _TZ3000_qkixdnon (Triple Relay Switch)
excerpt:
Prerequisites:
Before requesting a device addition, please ensure there is not already a request for the device among the open issues.

Make sure your Homey is upgraded to firmware v5 or higher.

You need a physical example of the device.

Device Information
Device Name: Tuya 3-Gang Relay Switch

Device Model: TS0003

Device Description: A Tuya Zigbee 3.0 triple relay switch with three independent on/off channels (EP1, EP2, EP3).

Link to device image: (Add your own photo URL here)

Additional Comments:
This is a Tuya TS0003 triple relay switch using private Tuya clusters (0xE000 / 0xE001).
Endpoint 1 controls relay 1, endpoint 2 controls relay 2, and endpoint 3 controls relay 3.
Device interview is complete and includes all endpoints, clusters, and attributes.
Purchased from a Tuya OEM vendor (Insue).

How to interview a device
Add the device as a generic Zigbee device in Homey.

Navigate to https://developer.athom.com/tools/zigbee.

Interview the device (button to the right of the device).

Click the copy button/icon to capture the device information.

Paste the copied information above.

To be able to add more devices to the Tuya Zigbee app, we rely on community members like you to provide interviews of the devices you want to be added. Thank you for your contribution!
aiAnalysis:
Based on the GitHub issue, here is the structured device information:

**Device Name:** Tuya 3-Gang Relay Switch
**Model ID:** TS0003
**Manufacturer Name:** `_TZ3000_qkixdnon`
**Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_qkixdnon` + `TS0003`
**Device Type:** Router (mains-powered)
**Endpoints:** 3 (EP1, EP2, EP3) + 1 (EP242 - Green Power)
**Clusters:** ZCL On/Off (0x0006) on EP1, EP2, EP3 + Tuya private clusters (0xE000, 0xE001)
**Capabilities:** `onoff.gang1`, `onoff.gang2`, `onoff.gang3`
**Driver:** `switch_3gang`
**Status:** Supported (fingerprint exists in driver)
